age_gate.image_alt: BeerBank logo - beer mug with dumbbell foam
age_gate.checkbox_label: I confirm that I am of legal drinking age in my country of residence AND I am not a moron who doesn't know how to drink responsibly.

hero.title: Enjoy beer without feeling like a lazy ass!
hero.subtitle: The exercise-to-beer tracker that makes fitness fun 🍺

intro.heading: So, you love beer but don't have regular workouts
intro.p1: You're just like me. I know sport is important, but have no <s>willpower</s> time to go to the gym.
intro.p2: However, I drink beer when I go to a bar quiz (love them both - quizzes and beer). So I thought - why not gamify the motivation part?

how_it_works.heading: BeerBank helps you add A LITTLE motion to your daily life

0.title: Step 1: Do a few quick exercises
0.description: Do several push-ups (3, or 5, or even 1) when you have a minute during your day (or squats, or any other quick exercise). Come on, you always have a minute!

1.title: Step 2: Log it in BeerBank
1.description: Add the number of exercises and see your Beer credit grow. You can choose how much credit you get for one exercise.

2.title: Step 3: Write off your Beer credit
2.description: When you buy a beer, write off the beer price from your credit.

3.title: Step 4: No credit? No beer!
3.description: Out of credit? Be honest and skip that beer :( Next time, don't be a loser and move your butt more often to earn your drink!

motivation.heading: Doing five push-ups is better than not doing fifty💪
motivation.body: Too lazy for 5 push-ups? Do 1 or 2. Too hard to do a push-up from the floor? Put your hands on a wall or table. Do a squat, raise a leg, nod your head. Do at least something: we all know regular workouts are better, but moving your ass a little is better than nothing at all.

try_app.heading: Get BeerBank on your phone! 📲
try_app.no_install_description: Just download and it will appear as a regular app (it's a PWA, if you know what it means)

testimonials.heading: Just look what these never-existing people* never said about BeerBank!

0.quote: BeerBank is fun! Pure motivation! Even my hamster does push-ups with me!
0.name: Jeffrey
0.title: Sandwich Alignment Expert

1.quote: Let's be honest: I'll never go to the gym. With BeerBank, I do at least a few squats a day!
1.name: Pierre
1.title: Lightbulb Replacement Consultant

2.quote: I don't know BeerBank. Never tried it, never will.
2.name: Some unknown asshole

features.0: Adding regional and world leaderboards (who did the most push-ups and who bought the most beer)
features.1: Adding AI advisor on which beer is worthy of your miserable sport efforts
features.2: Making a built-in iPhone feature, if they agree of course: we can call it CiderBank (badoom-tsss)
features.3: Jokes apart - the full online integration is ready, so stay tuned for more (follow me on LinkedIn)

final_banner.heading: Make your tiny training sessions a habit, with the help of BeerBank
